label: Software product
description: Turns a free workspace into a GitHub-managed software island: versioning, deploy, CI, worktree+PR guardrails. Opt-in per island (D4) — the parent workspace stays untouched.
title: Software island wizard
intro: The kit recommends a sensible default per choice; you decide. These write into THIS island's .claude/kit.config.json — nothing above it is touched.

options.label: GitHub (recommended)
options.description: GitHub-managed: issues + Projects v2 board + PR-per-issue. git != GitHub (D4).

options.label: Local git only
options.description: Silent local git, no GitHub board.

options.label: None for now
options.description: Decide later — no deploy config written.

options.label: GitHub Actions (recommended)
options.description: CI on PRs to the integration branch — gates merges.
